meaning: adj.(意大利北部城市)波伦亚的,波伦亚人的,波伦亚画派的 n.波伦亚人,波伦亚方言
examples: For me, spaghetti bolognese is the ultimate comfort food.
We all loved her - both for herself alone and for her spaghetti bolognese.
Any kind of pasta: Bolognese is good, or baked and/or stuffed pastas are good
For example, Wetherspoons also offered an Annabel Karmel spaghetti bolognese containing just 0.1g of salt.
But you might be surprised to find chefs adding it to your spaghetti Bolognese.
